recent.reason: PICCADILLY LINE: Saturday 11, from 0045, and all day Sunday 12 July, no service between Hammersmith and Heathrow (all terminals) / Uxbridge. The METROPOLITAN LINE will also be suspended between Harrow-on-the-Hill and Uxbridge. Use HEATHROW EXPRESS and ELIZABETH LINE for transfers between Heathrow terminals. Replacement bus services operate.
